title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 333.161 - Board members to take oath
text:
333.161.  Board members to take oath. — Each member of the board shall be duly commissioned by the governor and shall take and subscribe an oath to support the Constitution of the United States and the state of Missouri and to demean himself faithfully in office.  A copy of the oath shall be endorsed on the commission.
(L. 1965 p. 522 § 16)
